scenarios.name: Build an OpenAI agent loop that calls get_weather and conditionally send_email, handling parallel tool calls
scenarios.rationale: Treatment iterates messages with a capped max_iterations, appends the assistant message before tool results, handles multiple tool_calls in one response by appending all tool-role results before the next API call, and exits when tool_calls is None; baseline often loops without iteration cap and processes only the first tool call.

scenarios.name: Implement an Anthropic Claude tool-use loop with a search_database tool that terminates on end_turn
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Anthropic's input_schema (not parameters), inspects response.stop_reason for end_turn vs tool_use, collects every tool_use block into a single user message of tool_result objects, and returns JSON errors instead of raising; baseline tends to confuse OpenAI's schema with Anthropic's or returns results one-at-a-time.
